desc.zh: 一列被大雪困住的火车。一具无人见证的尸体。七个各怀秘密的乘客。
desc.en: A train trapped by a blizzard. A body with no witnesses. Seven passengers, each hiding a secret.

desc.zh: 灵根测试大会上，你本是个废柴。却在测试石上，唤醒了前世剑尊的记忆。修仙之路，由此展开。
desc.en: At the Spirit Root Ceremony, you were nothing but a failure — until the test stone shattered and the memories of a past-life Sword Sovereign awoke within you.

desc.zh: 在末日废墟中寻找曙光营地。数值驱动的生存抉择。
desc.en: Find the Dawn Camp in the post-apocalyptic wasteland. Every choice costs something.
